description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a neutral color palette. The front of the house includes a wooden garage structure and a small landscaped area with a palm tree and shrubs. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, wooden deck, lounge chairs, and lush greenery, creating a private outdoor retreat. Large windows are distributed across the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The house is constructed primarily from concrete or stucco, wood, and glass, with visible open-plan living areas and multiple rooms on the upper floor. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on outdoor living and seamless integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a wooden garage, and a backyard featuring a pool and deck. The design is minimalist and emphasizes outdoor living with landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden garage, main entry, and landscaped area with a palm tree and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long facade, garage, and the backyard with pool, deck, and lounge chairs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, wooden deck, lounge chairs, and large windows opening to the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's length, window arrangement, and the transition from the backyard to the front landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door adjacent to a wooden garage, with a small landscaped area and no prominent porch or overhang.
